verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Woman, look closely into his eyes you'll see One who's not perfect, yet forgiven and free And with this liberty God's given love to him for you.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Husband, look deeply into her eyes you'll find One who's been growing upon the Father's vine And now the time has come to be grafted into one through Him.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Precious the secret of cov'nant will unfold As you grow closer His heart we will behold The power of this vow is only good when you bow to the Author of Love

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Unto the Author of Love Unto the Author of Love
